title: senecio hortensiae
intro: Senecio hortensiae, also known as the "Hortensia Groundsel", is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio hortensiae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the digestive system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Senecio hortensiae is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from a range of health conditions.
